items.name: Ninja Animation Package
items.description: This animation pack only works with R15 avatars. Swift as an arrow, silent as a cloud. The best ninja is the one you never detect.

items.name: Silver Ninja Star of the Brilliant Light
items.description: In a light that casts no shadow, across a barren plain that affords no shade, range swift figures in immaculate flowing robes.

items.name: White Ninja Headband of the Unimpeachable Soul
items.description: And darkness shall be cast from me, for my soul resides in the sun.
